title: Drugs beginning with C: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text: Coricidin HBP Maximum Strength Flu Â® (as a combination product containing Acetaminophen, Chlorpheniramine, Dextromethorphan) see Dextromethorphan Coricidin HBP Nighttime Multi-Symptom Cold Â® (as a combination product containing Acetaminophen, Dextromethorphan, Doxylamine) see Dextromethorphan Coricidin Â® HBP Nighttime Multi-Symptom Cold (as a combination product containing Acetaminophen, Dextromethorphan, Doxylamine) see Doxylamine Corlanor Â® see Ivabradine Cormax Â® see Clobetasol Topical Correctol Â® see Bisacodyl Correctol 50 Plus Â® (as a combination product containing Docusate, Sennosides) see Senna Correctol 50 Plus Â® (as a combination product containing Docusate, Sennosides) see Stool Softeners Correctol Soft Gels Â® see Stool Softeners Cortan Â® see Prednisone Cortef Â® see Hydrocortisone Cortenema Â® see Hydrocortisone Rectal Corticotropin, Repository Injection Cortifoam Â® see Hydrocortisone Rectal Cortisol see Hydrocortisone Cortisporin Â® (as a combination product containing Bacitracin Zinc, Hydrocortisone, Neomycin, Polymyxin B Sulfates) see Bacitracin Ophthalmic Cortisporin Â® (as a combination product containing Bacitracin, Hydrocortisone, Neomycin, Polymyxin B) see Hydrocortisone Topical Cortisporin Cream Â® (as a combination product containing Neomycin, Polymyxin B, Hydrocortisone) see Neomycin, Polymyxin, Bacitracin, and Hydrocortisone Topical Cortisporin
